overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City at dusk. The player transitions from street level to an elevated covered pedestrian walkway lined with neon-lit archways, holographic billboards, and futuristic architecture, encountering moderate traffic and an NCPD police presence.

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street, navigating between parked and moving vehicles

entered.detail: vintage green sedan parked on the right side of the street
thick yellow utility pole on the sidewalk edge
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a city sidewalk next to a parked green classic car. The camera moves forward past a yellow traffic pole and crosses a wide street marked with bold yellow crosswalk stripes. Futuristic skyscrapers with neon signage rise in the background while sparse traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertising towers

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway with arched metal canopy structure

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the entrance of the covered walkway

entered.detail: futuristic curved metal framework with integrated yellow lighting forming a tunnel-like structure over the walkway
massive floating digital advertisement displaying product imagery
textured orange pedestrian pavement with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza dominated by massive holographic billboards and advertising towers. The camera approaches and enters a distinctive covered pedestrian walkway featuring a repeating arched metal canopy with warm yellow lighting. The ground transitions to an orange textured pedestrian surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated pedestrian walkway with vehicle parking

events.description: slowing slightly while passing the NCPD police officer and patrol car

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway passing parked vehicles and observing the police officer

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer standing next to a patrol car on the left side of the walkway

entered.detail: black and white police vehicle with glowing NCPD lettering on the side
dark colored sedan parked along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily through the covered walkway, passing beneath the repeating arched metal structure with its integrated yellow lighting. An NCPD police cruiser is parked on the left with an officer standing nearby. The walkway surface remains orange textured pavement, and holographic advertisements continue to line the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered walkway with continuous digital signage

events.description: encountering increased pedestrian traffic walking in both directions

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, navigating past other pedestrians

entered.detail: multi-level highway interchange visible in the distance against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the elevated covered walkway as dusk deepens. The arched canopy structure extends into the distance, lined with continuous digital advertising screens. More pedestrians appear, walking in both directions along the orange pathway. The city skyline with elevated highways and glass towers is visible through the open sides of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling street-level intersection into a futuristic, elevated pedestrian corridor as dusk settles over the city. It begins on a sidewalk beside a parked green classic car, moving past a yellow traffic pole and across a wide street marked with bold yellow crosswalk stripes toward a backdrop of neon skyscrapers. As the camera crosses the intersection, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza dominated by massive holographic billboards before the camera enters a covered walkway characterized by a repeating arched metal canopy and warm yellow lighting. The movement continues steadily along this orange textured pavement, passing a parked NCPD police cruiser and an officer while holographic advertisements line the right side. Finally, the path extends further into the deepening twilight, passing more pedestrians beneath the continuous digital screens of the canopy with the city's glass towers and elevated highways visible through the open sides.
